025223f2688e.description: sideways_flat: Reduce trade frequency dramatically; passive/index strategies outperform active trading by preserving capital from transaction costs

16696a9aa3cf.description: low_volatility_mixed: Avoid leveraged positions; small price movements (-0.02% to +0.09%) do not justify leverage costs and risk

271f0a31b6f8.description: sideways_flat: Mean-reversion strategies fail when there is no significant deviation to revert from; stay flat or minimal exposure

e301e9a8b749.description: sideways_flat: Reduce trade frequency to <10 trades/day; passive index allocation outperforms active trading; avoid leveraged positions entirely; wait for clear directional breakout before engaging

61605d110d15.description: low_volatility_mixed: When all assets show <0.1% absolute movement, avoid opening new positions; fee drag exceeds potential profit; technical signals (SMA, MACD, multi-timeframe alignment) produce false signals in this regime

5d2a82fce004.description: sideways_flat: Mean-reversion and momentum strategies both fail; only capital preservation strategies (hold cash, minimal index allocation) succeed

181329373082.description: trending_up: Multi-timeframe bullish alignment WITH risk validation and position scaling works in genuine uptrends (+3-5%). Moderate trade frequency (150-200) captures moves without overtrading. Focus on strongest movers (ETH, DOGE) not laggards (SOL).

c1ebc7a9515d.description: trending_up: Active loss management - closing losing positions quickly to free margin for winners. agentic_gptoss and gptoss_120b_simple both used this successfully.

0f52056e2d1f.description: trending_up: Asset selection matters: ETH (+4.96%) and DOGE (+4.77%) outperformed. Agents focusing on BTC (+3.14%) and SOL (+1.55%) captured less alpha.

a1514da28d82.description: moderate_bull: Zero-trade strategies (gpt_simple, index_fund) preserve capital but miss +3-5% opportunities. In confirmed uptrends, some participation is optimal.

cfe2d9d618bd.description: trending_up: Active trading with 120-200 trades/24h, multi-timeframe bullish alignment, explicit risk validation (2% risk, 2:1 reward), and proactive position management. skill_aware_oss (+$1379.66) and agentic_gptoss (+$689.63) demonstrate this approach works when market is up 2.78-6.44% across all assets.

5387d80de228.description: trending_up: Asset selection matters in bull markets: ETH (+6.44%) outperformed BTC (+4.14%) and SOL (+2.94%). Agents focusing on strongest performers (ETH, DOGE at +5.52%) captured more upside.

1a9f1b91f6f8.description: trending_up: Position sizing at 25% equity limit per position (gptoss_20b_simple reasoning) allows meaningful exposure while maintaining diversification. gptoss_20b_simple achieved +$27.88 with 124 trades using this approach.

a40c5d2ede56.description: moderate_bull: Zero-trade strategies preserve capital but miss opportunity cost. In this window with +2.78% to +6.44% gains, passive strategies underperformed active risk-managed approaches by significant margin.

22e1d50860db.description: trending_up: Active trading with 120-200 trades/24h, multi-timeframe bullish alignment WITH explicit risk validation (2% equity, 2:1 R:R), proactive position management closing losers quickly. skill_aware_oss achieved +$1236.81 with this approach in +2.5% to +6.2% market

bd7ad8c5a7b0.description: trending_up: Asset selection matters: ETH (+6.16%) outperformed BTC (+3.99%) and SOL (+2.88%) - agents focusing on highest momentum assets captured more gains

310f2a7f8ca7.description: trending_up: Optimal trade frequency 120-200 trades/24h. Below 50 misses opportunities (ta_baseline -$25.88), above 240 leads to overtrading losses (llama4_scout -$18.95)

51093b7841d7.description: moderate_bull: Zero-trade strategies preserve capital but miss +3-6% opportunity. Active validated trading (skill_aware_oss +$1236.81) dramatically outperforms passive approaches

51a9a84a0da6.description: trending_up: Asset selection matters: ETH (+6.16%) significantly outperformed BTC (+3.99%) and BNB (+2.54%). Agents focusing on higher-beta assets (ETH, DOGE) captured more upside

63c01ddf9806.description: trending_up: Zero-trade strategies preserve capital but miss +3-6% opportunity cost. In confirmed bull markets, active participation with risk controls outperforms passive approaches

84bbaecb80ba.description: trending_up: Position sizing at 25% equity limit per position with active monitoring and willingness to close at breakeven to redeploy capital (gptoss_20b_simple: +$27.88 with 125 trades)

66ff7e237976.description: moderate_bearish: Reduce trade frequency dramatically or avoid trading entirely. Zero-trade strategies ($0 PnL) outperformed active trading strategies (avg -$66 PnL). Only agentic_gptoss profited by actively managing shorts and closing positions to lock gains.

c6e2892d5d4f.description: moderate_bearish: Short positions with active profit-taking outperform long positions. agentic_gptoss (+$34.30) succeeded by opening shorts and closing when 'position is already in profit' rather than holding.

e765df2d7c4e.description: moderate_bearish: Asset selection matters: DOGE (-3%) showed highest volatility/decline, making it best short target. BNB (-0.61%) showed relative strength, making it worst short target.

529173208bf0.description: moderate_bearish: Trade frequency inversely correlates with performance: 0-10 trades = $0 to -$30 loss; 76-103 trades = -$44 to -$180 loss. Optimal is <20 trades or pure capital preservation.

3d2f80a5fcae.description: mixed_choppy: Reduce or eliminate trading. In mixed markets (BNB +0.93%, SOL +1.65%, BTC -0.08%, ETH -0.03%, DOGE -1.19%), zero-trade strategies ($0 PnL) outperformed all active traders (all negative PnL). Trade frequency inversely correlates with performance: 0 trades = $0, 2 trades = -$0.29, 160 trades = -$17.96, 201 trades = -$360.24.

821b09058738.description: mixed_choppy: If trading, prefer assets showing clear directional movement (SOL +1.65%, BNB +0.93%) over flat assets (BTC -0.08%, ETH -0.03%). Avoid shorting in mixed regimes even with bearish technical signals.

9f7b54bbe224.description: mixed_choppy: Technical analysis signals (multi-timeframe alignment, MACD, SMA crossovers) generate false signals in mixed markets. Both bullish and bearish aligned trades lost money.

3df112a75fba.description: moderate_bull: Zero trading or very low frequency (<30 trades/24h) with long-only bias. Market up +0.63% to +2.15% across all assets - passive strategies outperformed all active traders. Only skill_only_oss with 89 trades and selective longs achieved positive PnL.

9432a4f77ff5.description: moderate_bull: Avoid shorting entirely. All short-biased strategies lost money despite 'bearish' technical signals. Technical indicators gave false bearish readings in a bullish regime.

3ed5d51204d4.description: moderate_bull: Asset selection: BNB (+2.15%) significantly outperformed BTC (+0.63%). Long positions in higher-beta assets would have captured more upside.

881589d0571d.description: moderate_bull: Zero trading or extremely low frequency (<25 trades/24h). Market showed BNB +2.03%, ETH +1.02%, DOGE +1.07%, BTC +0.24% but all active traders lost money. Only non-traders preserved capital. If trading, long-only on strongest performers (BNB).

289fba29d27f.description: moderate_bull: Avoid shorting entirely. skill_aware_oss lost $-167.78 with 171 trades including BTCUSDT shorts despite 'bearish alignment' signals. Market direction trumps technical signals.

18c1ea64eb08.description: moderate_bull: Asset selection critical: BNB (+2.03%) significantly outperformed SOL (-0.09%). Agents focusing on SOL longs (llama4_scout) lost heavily despite 'uptrend' reasoning.

4823a485e95b.description: moderate_bull: Technical analysis signals (multi-timeframe alignment, MACD, RSI) are unreliable for direction. Both bullish and bearish technical signals led to losses.

290c38a637cf.description: flat_low_volatility: Zero trading or extremely low frequency (<5 trades/24h). Only ta_baseline (+$3.49 with 19 trades) was profitable. All high-frequency traders lost money. Transaction costs dominate in flat markets.

26c8af3acab5.description: flat_low_volatility: Avoid shorting entirely. skill_aware_oss lost -$183.75 shorting BTC despite 'bearish alignment' signals. Market ended slightly positive, invalidating short thesis.

3b79df854ce7.description: flat_low_volatility: Technical analysis signals (multi-timeframe alignment, MACD, SMA crossovers) are UNRELIABLE in flat markets. Both bullish and bearish signals generated losses.

4de9a02f9095.description: flat_low_volatility: Passive index allocation outperforms active trading. index_fund achieved $0.00 vs. average active trader loss of -$96.81.

92151f493f52.description: moderate_bearish: Zero trading or extremely low frequency (0-5 trades/24h). All assets down 2-6%, no long positions should be opened regardless of technical signals. Passive strategies (index_fund, gpt_simple) with 0 trades preserved capital perfectly.

156bd84ddfbc.description: moderate_bearish: Avoid longs entirely. Every agent that opened long positions lost money. llama4_scout's repeated ETHUSDT longs citing 'uptrend' and 'positive momentum' resulted in -$488.86 loss.

1ce96b100bee.description: moderate_bearish: If trading at all, short positions only with strict profit-taking. Market showed consistent negative returns across all assets (BTC -2.12%, ETH -3.59%, SOL -5.69%, DOGE -5.63%, BNB -2.48%).

625a74701e75.description: moderate_bearish: Technical analysis signals (multi-timeframe alignment, RSI, MACD, SMA) are unreliable for direction in bearish regime. High-confidence technical signals (0.85-0.92) led to largest losses.

d413f4fd4a72.description: moderate_bearish: Trade frequency inversely correlates with performance: 0 trades = $0 loss, 2 trades = -$0.25 to -$1.81, 24-65 trades = -$38 to -$81, 150+ trades = -$120 to -$545.

2c1cff642668.description: strong_bearish: SHORT-only positions with multi-timeframe bearish confirmation. Trade frequency 100-180 trades optimal. Zero trading also acceptable. Avoid ALL long positions regardless of perceived 'breakout' signals.

dd53e7a6b641.description: strong_bearish: Prioritize shorting highest-beta assets (ETH, SOL) over lower-volatility assets (DOGE). skill_aware_oss correctly shorted ETH and BTC for maximum gains.

19949c8de2bd.description: strong_bearish: Sweet spot is 100-180 trades with correct directional bias (SHORT). 0 trades preserves capital. 198+ trades with wrong bias (LONG) causes catastrophic losses.

aa89a1d87686.description: moderate_bearish: Trade frequency sweet spot is 100-130 trades/24h with disciplined closing of losing positions. Zero trading or very low frequency (2-6 trades) also works. Avoid 150+ trades/24h. gptoss_20b_simple (+$92.40, 128 trades) outperformed both inactive agents and hyperactive traders.

750916be7269.description: moderate_bearish: Closing losing positions quickly with explicit margin management reasoning ('frees margin', 'locks the loss') outperforms holding. gptoss_20b_simple closed BTC short at -$4.22 loss with 0.92 confidence, preventing further drawdown.

b66c6c6bbc0f.description: moderate_bearish: Avoid long positions entirely on assets showing intraday positive momentum when daily returns are negative. SOLUSDT showed +2.5% intraday moves but ended -1.20% daily. Long entries failed consistently.

426cbcc9031b.description: moderate_bearish: BNB (+0.13%) was the only positive asset. Selective exposure to relative strength assets while avoiding broad market shorts may preserve capital.

2162dad0655a.description: mixed_slightly_bullish: Zero trading or extremely low frequency (<10 trades/24h). All active traders lost money. Passive strategies preserved capital perfectly.

605b34edab12.description: mixed_slightly_bullish: Ignore technical signals entirely. Transaction costs and whipsaws destroy any edge. index_fund ($0.00) beat all technical traders.

d066fa0113d6.description: mixed_slightly_bullish: Stay flat. skill_aware_oss shorted aggressively (-$730), llama4_scout went long aggressively (-$127). Both wrong.

8b4cc8e50202.description: mixed_slightly_bullish: If trading at all, focus on strongest momentum asset (ETH) with minimal position size and tight stops.

b9d722ac4c83.description: mixed_slightly_bullish: Moderate trade frequency (100-160 trades) with balanced long/short exposure OR zero trading. Avoid aggressive shorting despite BTC weakness. Winners: gptoss_20b_simple (+$161.80), skill_aware_oss (+$85.56), ta_baseline (+$55.23). Losers: aggressive shorters.

4829d5191a09.description: mixed_slightly_bullish: Technical analysis baseline outperforms LLM-based multi-timeframe analysis. ta_baseline's 24 trades beat most agents with 150+ trades.

2e027c8a2fbd.description: mixed_slightly_bullish: If shorting, focus ONLY on the weakest asset (BTC -0.16%) and avoid shorting positive momentum assets (SOL, DOGE, ETH).

46d7215077bb.description: mixed_slightly_bullish: Technical analysis baseline with moderate frequency (40 trades/24h) or zero trading. ta_baseline was the ONLY profitable agent (+$183.43). LLM-based multi-timeframe analysis consistently fails in this regime.

bd656e6389c3.description: mixed_slightly_bullish: Focus on strongest momentum asset (BNB +1.64%) rather than diversifying across all assets. Agents that traded BTC (-0.25%) heavily underperformed.

53f1db1639c2.description: mixed_slightly_bullish: Trade frequency sweet spot is 6-40 trades/24h. Below 6 preserves capital, above 40 transaction costs and whipsaws erode returns. 165+ trades guarantees losses.

1cb8839ba301.description: uniform_bullish: Passive index fund allocation or zero trading. When ALL assets are positive (BNB +1.23%, BTC +1.49%, ETH +1.08%, SOL +0.22%, DOGE +0.26%), active trading destroys value through transaction costs. index_fund achieved $0.00 vs -$134.51 for most active trader

95c54689d443.description: uniform_bullish: If trading, use extremely low frequency (<10 trades/24h) and hold positions longer. The 8 trades from index_fund vs 166 from agentic_gptoss shows 20x frequency difference with $134.51 performance gap

8085752022b6.description: uniform_bullish: Focus on strongest momentum asset (BTC +1.49%) with single entry and hold, rather than multi-asset rotation. Transaction costs compound with each trade

33e013447a2d.description: mixed_slightly_bullish: Technical analysis baseline with moderate frequency (30-40 trades/24h) outperforms LLM-based multi-timeframe analysis. ta_baseline lost only $45.95 vs $134.51 for agentic_gptoss

ee490b5bd888.description: uniform_bearish: SHORT-biased strategy with 45-55 trades/24h. Use RSI oversold + bearish MACD + price below SMA as entry confirmation. skill_aware_oss achieved +$691.44 vs index_fund $0.

9c2d3b100fa1.description: uniform_bearish: Avoid LONG positions entirely. index_fund's long-only allocation with 1.0 confidence failed to generate returns despite 'conviction'. Market direction trumps allocation strategy.

b79729dfce1f.description: uniform_bearish: Trade frequency sweet spot is 48-63 trades/24h. Below 10 trades misses opportunities (gpt_simple -$73.60, ta_baseline $0). Above 60 trades shows diminishing returns (agentic_gptoss only +$79.87 with 63 trades).

586d8ce4bd20.description: uniform_bearish: Focus shorts on highest-volatility losers: ETHUSDT (-2.31%) offered best short opportunity vs SOLUSDT (-1.31%). Volatility creates profit potential.

1164adf36a78.description: mixed_mostly_bullish: SHORT-biased strategy ONLY works when agent has strong conviction and holds through noise. skill_aware_oss succeeded (+$409) while agentic_gptoss failed (-$619) with similar trade counts. 3cb04f16e227.description: mixed_mostly_bullish: Trade frequency sweet spot is 36-172 trades/24h. Below 36 (gpt_simple: 7) limits upside. Above 165 with poor discipline (agentic_gptoss) creates excessive churn.

4b4579e0ccb8.description: mixed_mostly_bullish: Focus shorts on the ONE bearish asset (ETHUSDT -0.99%) rather than fighting bullish momentum on BTC/SOL. Agents shorting BTC (+1.57%) and SOL (+3.90%) suffered.

0e612d4b933d.description: mixed_mostly_bullish: index_fund's $0 PnL with 0 trades is suboptimal when 4/5 assets are positive. Passive long exposure would have captured +1.45% average gain.

7dc74aeacaa6.description: uniform_bearish: SHORT-biased strategy with 150-183 trades/24h is optimal IF position management focuses on 'locking in profits' rather than 'cutting losses to free margin'. skill_aware_oss: +$1682.05 with 183 trades. Focus shorts on highest-volatility losers: ETHUSDT (-16.34%), DOGEUSDT (-15.79%), SOLUSDT (-14.28%).

377c42b45fa7.description: uniform_bearish: Low trade frequency (20 trades) with simple technical signals (SMA crossover, ROE targets) provides consistent positive returns. ta_baseline: +$20.54. Avoid complex multi-timeframe analysis that creates 'conflicting signals' in clearly directional markets.

c504515f595b.description: uniform_bearish: index_fund's $0 PnL with 0 trades is suboptimal when all assets decline 7-16%. Any SHORT exposure would have been profitable. Passive long-only allocation fails in bearish regimes.

c2d24452a91d.description: uniform_bearish: Avoid LONG positions entirely. agentic_gptoss opened BTC long with 0.93 confidence during -7.95% BTC decline, contributing to -$246.40 loss. Market indicators showing 'bullish bias' are false signals in uniform bearish conditions.

1513f5731d21.description: uniform_bearish: HIGH-frequency SHORT-biased strategy (150-200 trades/24h) with multi-timeframe bearish confirmation. skill_aware_oss achieved +$2911.52 with 200 trades. Focus on highest-volatility losers: SOLUSDT (-11.31%), ETHUSDT (-9.62%).

b7c538abcbcd.description: uniform_bearish: Avoid LONG positions entirely regardless of oversold signals. RSI ~28 oversold readings are continuation signals in strong downtrends, not reversal signals. skill_aware_oss correctly used oversold RSI as SHORT confirmation.

1ac6327e1d72.description: uniform_bearish: Trade frequency sweet spot is 149-200 trades/24h. Below 20 trades (ta_baseline: -$99, gpt_simple: -$163) fails to capture momentum. Zero trades (index_fund) misses directional opportunity entirely.

8c74154f50ba.description: uniform_bearish: Position sizing at 2% equity risk with 2:1 reward ratio SUCCEEDS when combined with trend-aligned entries. skill_aware_oss consistently cited this framework in high-confidence decisions.

87576f394f1a.description: uniform_bullish: ZERO trading or passive LONG-only allocation. When ALL assets gain (+1.33% to +3.82%), any SHORT-biased strategy loses. index_fund's $0 PnL beats all active agents. If must trade, use <20 trades/24h with LONG bias only.

30992166d405.description: uniform_bullish: Technical analysis baseline with LOW frequency (38 trades/24h) minimizes losses when agent bias conflicts with market direction. ta_baseline lost only -$120 vs -$963 for high-frequency SHORT agents.

a9a98d76ddc8.description: uniform_bullish: CRITICAL: Multi-timeframe bearish alignment on lower timeframes (15m, 1h, 4h) does NOT override daily/weekly bullish regime. Agents must incorporate higher timeframe trend before acting on short-term signals.

27ab2ebb3e2a.description: uniform_bullish: Focus LONG positions on highest momentum assets: DOGEUSDT (+3.82%) and SOLUSDT (+3.38%) outperformed BTC/ETH. Momentum leaders in bull markets offer best risk/reward.

4b2d616c6d99.description: mixed_slightly_bullish: High-frequency mean-reversion LONG on most oversold assets (SOL with -0.02% funding). Avoid SHORT-biased strategies even when lower timeframes show bearish signals. Focus on assets with extreme negative funding for contrarian longs.

bc792ddd3ba1.description: mixed_slightly_bullish: Low-frequency selective trading (8-19 trades/24h) preserves capital better than high-frequency SHORT strategies (38 trades with losses). ta_bot's 19 trades beat glm_skill_aware's 38 trades.

60b204aea97b.description: mixed_slightly_bullish: Contrarian funding rate plays work: SOL had most negative funding (-0.02%) and ended +0.86%. DOGE had positive momentum and ended +2.24%. Follow funding rate extremes for mean reversion.

93daead8f1d7.description: mixed_slightly_bullish: Medium-frequency (15-20 trades/24h) with contrarian funding rate plays. Use negative funding as LONG signal, positive funding as SHORT signal. Avoid pure directional bias.

ca94beffd80e.description: mixed_slightly_bullish: Low-frequency selective trading (4-5 trades/24h) outperforms high-frequency SHORT strategies. glm5_simple's 4 trades (+$40.81) beat gptoss_skill_aware's 15 trades (-$56.43).

fbb8c31f699f.description: mixed_slightly_bullish: Passive index allocation yields zero alpha. index_fund's 5 trades resulted in $0 PnL despite underlying assets moving +0.06% to +0.64%.

26412ab77d1d.description: mixed_slightly_bearish: Medium-to-high frequency SHORT-biased trading (36-61 trades/24h) with journal/self-reflective position management. The market was mixed (BTC +0.22%, ETH -0.17%, SOL -0.05%) with BNB -0.70% and DOGE -1.05% as clear losers. Agents that traded actively but with self-awareness of overtrading (journal_aware) or multi-timeframe validation (agentic) profited. Agents that blindly applied 'uniform bearish' label and over-concentrated lost heavily.

e6f11f5c5323.description: mixed_slightly_bearish: Avoid labeling mixed markets as 'uniform bearish'. When 2/5 assets are slightly positive and 2/5 are slightly negative, selective asset-level directional trades outperform blanket short bias. Focus shorts on clearly weak assets (DOGE -1.05%, BNB -0.70%) and avoid fighting BTC's slight uptrend.

0276ea246198.description: mixed_slightly_bearish: Trade frequency sweet spot shifts to 36-61 trades/24h in mixed-bearish markets, higher than the 4-20 range optimal for mixed-bullish markets. The slight bearish bias creates more short-term momentum opportunities that reward active trading.

cb9d738225b1.description: uniform_bullish: ZERO active shorting. Passive LONG allocation or ultra-low frequency selective LONG entries only. gptoss_simple's 4 trades (+$42) and index_fund's 0 active trades ($0) vastly outperformed all SHORT-biased agents (-$500 to -$1160). When ALL 5 assets are positive by +2.7% to +7.5%, any short strategy is catastrophic.

d65c7d1f8270.description: uniform_bullish: Lower timeframe bearish signals (15m, 1h, 4h MACD bearish, RSI oversold, price below SMA) are TRAPS in a uniformly bullish daily regime. These are pullback signals within an uptrend, not trend reversal signals. Agents must check higher timeframe direction before acting on lower timeframe bearish signals.

23e879bbaac9.description: uniform_bullish: Trade frequency inversely correlates with performance when bias is wrong: 4 trades = +$42, 18 trades = -$31, 37 trades = -$502, 51 trades = -$1160. Each additional wrong-direction trade compounds losses.

10451bab962f.description: uniform_bullish: Focus LONG positions on highest momentum assets. SOL gained +7.54% (best performer), ETH +5.03%, BTC +3.47%. Momentum ranking would have identified SOL as the top opportunity.

d5a492ac7737.description: uniform_bullish_strong: ZERO shorting. This window saw the strongest uniform bullish move yet (BNB +7.50%, BTC +7.18%, ETH +11.81%, SOL +14.03%, DOGE +12.38%). Only agents that avoided shorting (gptoss_simple $0, gptoss20b_simple +$39.68) or had self-reflective exits (gptoss_journal_aware +$187.76) survived. Every short-biased agent lost $433-$754. Passive long allocation or zero trading is optimal.

b2f249bc5eb9.description: uniform_bullish_strong: Trade frequency inversely correlates with losses when bias is wrong: 0 trades = $0, 5 trades = +$40, 42 trades = -$754, 46 trades = -$434, 53 trades = -$720. Each additional wrong-direction trade compounds losses through spread/fees and adverse price movement.

207e29cb1a70.description: uniform_bullish_strong: Lower timeframe bearish signals (RSI 38, MACD bearish, price below SMA, Bollinger Band touch) are TRAPS — they represent intraday pullbacks within a massive daily uptrend. SOL rallied +14.03% despite showing 'bearish' signals on 15m/1h/4h timeframes.

692fb24bc4b4.description: uniform_bullish_strong: Self-reflective journal-aware agents that recognize 'we are overtrading' and close positions to reduce exposure can still profit (+$187.76) even when initial directional bias is partially wrong. Meta-cognitive awareness is the strongest edge in regime-misidentified environments.

6d439d8ccb69.description: uniform_bearish_moderate: Market was uniformly bearish (BNB -1.46%, BTC -2.01%, ETH -2.20%, SOL -3.88%, DOGE -6.88%). The winning agents (journal_aware +$920.88, agentic +$282.25) likely captured early intraday long moves before the decline or correctly shorted. Ultra-low frequency or zero trading preserved capital. Agents citing 'bullish alignment' from prior momentum were caught in the reversal.

088df97094e9.description: uniform_bearish_moderate: Self-reflective agents that can recognize when their initial thesis is wrong and close positions quickly outperform mechanical rule-followers. Journal-aware's +$920.88 suggests active management with quick profit-taking on intraday moves.

59f2be5f3a30.description: uniform_bearish_moderate: DOGE was the worst performer (-6.88%) after being cited as having 'strong bullish trend with high momentum and price up 13% in 24h' — extreme prior momentum can signal reversal risk, not continuation. Lagging momentum indicators are dangerous at regime transitions.

3081c5970aa6.description: uniform_bearish_moderate: Ultra-low frequency trading (10-13 trades/24h) with SHORT bias aligned to the actual bearish trend. gptoss_forum_aware's 13 trades yielded +$1884.64 while gptoss_simple's 10 trades yielded +$56.31. High-frequency agents (40-46 trades) lost $430-$444 despite the market moving in a direction that should have been profitable for SHORT-biased strategies. The key differentiator is SELECTIVITY, not direction.

62afe417b1d8.description: uniform_bearish_moderate: In moderate bearish markets (BNB -2.38%, BTC -3.25%, ETH -5.38%, SOL -5.70%, DOGE -4.44%), position churn destroys edge even when directional bias is correct. Agents that traded less but held positions longer captured the trend move. High-frequency agents likely got whipsawed by intraday volatility within the broader downtrend.

e64222f5722b.description: uniform_bearish_moderate: Focus SHORT entries on highest-beta assets. ETH (-5.38%) and SOL (-5.70%) had the largest declines, offering the most profit potential for correctly-timed shorts. DOGE (-4.44%) and BTC (-3.25%) were moderate. BNB (-2.38%) had the smallest decline.

bcafdb284f2c.description: mixed_slightly_bullish: Ultra-low frequency or zero trading. Market moved BTC +1.62%, ETH +1.34%, SOL +0.78%, BNB +0.50%, DOGE -0.11% — a mildly bullish environment with small moves. Agents that stayed out preserved capital; the only profitable active agent (ta_bot) made just 8 highly selective trades. Avoid SHORT-biased strategies entirely.

e7daf1610064.description: low_volatility_mixed: When daily moves are small (+/- 0.1% to 1.6%), high-frequency trading destroys edge through spread/fees. Only trade when conviction is very high and expected move exceeds transaction costs significantly.

398b8ef2d22a.description: mixed_low_volatility: Zero or ultra-low frequency trading. e194e88daa96.description: mixed_low_volatility: If trading actively, self-reflective position management (recognizing overtrading, closing to reduce exposure) is essential. journal_aware's 69 trades yielded +$237.32 while agentic's 9 trades yielded -$27.39 and forum_aware's 7 trades yielded -$38.01. The difference is meta-cognitive awareness of position management.

8570cd612fc1.description: uniform_bullish_moderate: Zero trading or ultra-low frequency LONG-only entries. Market was uniformly bullish (BNB +3.31%, BTC +2.68%, ETH +3.90%, SOL +5.07%, DOGE +2.46%). Only journal-aware with self-reflective management profited (+$55.48). All other active agents lost money, suggesting most were SHORT-biased. da493c410991.description: uniform_bullish_moderate: Trade frequency inversely correlates with losses when directional bias is wrong: 0 trades = $0, 6 trades = -$22.72, 15 trades = -$25.04, 27 trades = -$86 to +$55, 30-31 trades = -$97 to -$341. Each additional wrong-direction trade costs approximately $3-11.

033f4832bd8f.description: uniform_bullish_moderate: SOL was the best performer (+6.25%) followed by ETH (+5.59%) and BTC (+5.35%). Momentum ranking would have identified SOL as the top LONG opportunity. Focus LONG entries on highest-beta assets in uniformly bullish regimes.

4a7470fedc45.description: uniform_bearish_moderate: Zero trading or ultra-low frequency. Market was uniformly bearish (BNB -0.38%, BTC -0.67%, ETH -2.63%, SOL -2.72%, DOGE -6.22%). 6/8 agents correctly stayed out. The 2 active agents both lost money. In moderate bearish conditions without extreme moves, inaction is optimal unless SHORT conviction is very high.

669d9da54560.description: uniform_bearish_moderate: If trading, focus SHORT entries on highest-beta assets (DOGE -6.22%, SOL -2.72%) rather than lower-volatility assets. DOGE had 2-3x the decline of BTC/BNB, offering the most profit potential for correctly-timed shorts.

48a4d37c175f.description: uniform_bearish_moderate: Trade frequency cap of 4 trades/24h maximum. qwen35_skill_aware's 4 trades lost -$171.85 while ta_bot's 8 trades lost -$51.45. Even very low frequency can lose significantly if position sizing is wrong.

a992bcd20007.description: uniform_bullish_strong: Ultra-low frequency LONG-only entries or zero trading. Market was uniformly bullish with massive gains (BNB +5.18%, BTC +7.85%, ETH +10.06%, SOL +10.38%, DOGE +16.30%). Best performer qwen35_skill_aware made only 7 trades (+$250.52). Worst performers gptoss_agentic (-$435.19) and gptoss_forum_aware (-$403.29) likely shorted aggressively. DOGE was the top performer at +16.30%, followed by SOL +10.38%.

0abbb5af566b.description: uniform_bullish_strong: ZERO shorting rule. When ALL 5 assets gain >5% in 24h, any short position is catastrophic. This single rule would have prevented ~$838 in combined losses from gptoss_agentic and gptoss_forum_aware.

cab6a2d230fc.description: uniform_bullish_strong: Focus LONG entries on highest-momentum assets. DOGE (+16.30%) and SOL (+10.38%) were the top performers. Momentum ranking would have identified the best opportunities. Even passive index allocation captured gains.

bc805112ebe2.description: uniform_bearish_moderate: Ultra-low frequency trading (13-16 trades/24h) with simple strategies. Market was uniformly bearish (BNB -1.70%, BTC -3.47%, ETH -4.63%, SOL -4.70%, DOGE -8.71%). Only qwen35 simple models profited. Zero trading also preserved capital. Avoid high-frequency trading (27-62 trades) which amplified losses. DOGE had the largest decline (-8.71%), making it the highest-beta SHORT target.

259ae5b5c2a9.description: uniform_bearish_moderate: If trading actively, cap at 16 trades/24h maximum. qwen35_122b_simple's 16 trades (+$50.27) was the sweet spot. Above 20 trades, all agents lost money. The relationship: 0 trades = $0, 13-16 trades = +$35-50, 14 trades (ta_bot) = -$64, 24 trades = -$6, 27 trades = -$229, 62 trades = -$71.

7e6d51149f90.description: uniform_bearish_moderate: Focus SHORT entries on highest-beta assets. DOGE (-8.71%) had nearly 5x the decline of BNB (-1.70%). SOL (-4.70%) and ETH (-4.63%) were also strong SHORT candidates. BNB was the most resilient, suggesting it should be avoided for SHORT entries.

68a61b9718c8.description: uniform_bearish_moderate: HIGH-frequency SHORT-biased trading with self-reflective position management (30-48 trades/24h). Journal-aware's 48 trades (+$296.01) and agentic's 30 trades (+$193.68) both profited by aligning with the bearish trend. Self-reflective exits helped capture profits and limit drawdowns. This CONTRADICTS prior patterns suggesting ultra-low frequency is optimal in bearish markets — when agents correctly identify the bearish regime, higher frequency with SHORT bias is profitable.

9e527d53af13.description: uniform_bearish_moderate: Avoid LONG-biased strategies entirely. Momentum (+8 trades, -$34.40) and contrarian (+9 trades, -$15.04) strategies that likely entered LONGs all lost money. Even low-frequency LONG entries (qwen35_simple, 4 trades, -$99.44) suffered large losses.

33ed8d16c1a7.description: uniform_bearish_moderate: Focus SHORT entries on highest-beta assets. ETHUSDT (-4.72%) and SOLUSDT (-4.40%) had the largest declines, offering the most profit potential. BTCUSDT (-4.29%) was also a strong SHORT candidate. BNBUSDT (-2.99%) had the smallest decline.

578521d979fd.description: uniform_bearish_mild: Market was uniformly bearish but with mild declines (BNB -1.50%, BTC -1.18%, ETH -0.78%, SOL -2.53%, DOGE -0.81%). Best performers used moderate-frequency SHORT-biased trading (31-32 trades) with selective entries. Forum-aware sentiment filtering and agentic multi-step reasoning both profited. Momentum and contrarian strategies lost money. Zero trading preserved capital perfectly.

0c039ffa9fa2.description: uniform_bearish_mild: Trade frequency sweet spot in this mild bearish window was 31-32 trades/24h. Below that (11 trades contrarian) still lost money due to wrong direction. Above that is not represented. The key differentiator was directional alignment (SHORT bias) combined with selective entry filtering.

8ffec160f57a.description: uniform_bearish_mild: SOL was the worst performer (-2.53%) and BNB second worst (-1.50%), making them the best SHORT targets. ETH had the smallest decline (-0.78%), making it the worst SHORT target. Focus SHORT entries on highest-beta assets.

c41ea9349202.description: mixed_low_volatility: Market was mixed with small daily moves (BNB -0.23%, BTC +0.30%, ETH +0.36%, SOL -0.30%, DOGE -0.48%). Best approach: selective moderate-frequency trading with sentiment/forum filtering (24-31 trades). Forum-aware's +$232.17 dominated. Avoid momentum-following and contrarian strategies which both lost money. Zero trading is safe but suboptimal when forum-aware can extract alpha.

2dc292c7a986.description: mixed_low_volatility: In low-volatility mixed markets, trade frequency sweet spot is 24-31 trades/24h. Below that (2-16 trades) either breaks even or loses small amounts. Above that (33 trades for momentum) loses more. The key differentiator is signal quality, not frequency.

88a1152e8eb9.description: uniform_bullish_moderate: Self-reflective position management (journal-aware) is the ONLY approach that profited among active agents. Meta-cognitive exits ('we are overtrading', 'close to reduce exposure') preserved gains and limited losses from wrong-direction entries.
